nodes.label: extractJSON() helper
nodes.rationale: Haiku 4.5 adds preamble/postamble text around JSON output; extractJSON() finds the first/last bracket pair to extract valid JSON regardless of surrounding text, replacing fragile regex-strip-only parsing.

nodes.label: normalizeLinkedin() helper
nodes.rationale: pdf2json extracts only the visible username text, not the href, so LinkedIn profile links appear as bare usernames; normalizeLinkedin() reconstructs the full https://www.linkedin.com/in/<username> URL from any partial form.

nodes.label: Coordinate-based PDF text joining
nodes.rationale: pdf2json stores text as discrete positioned tokens; naive .join(' ') misjoins them. Using the x/y gap between consecutive tokens (gap < 0.5 and same line) decides whether to join with no space or a space, fixing cases like underscores being dropped (hadi_emadi -> hadiemadi) and email/LinkedIn corruption.

nodes.label: confirmedContact session override pattern
nodes.rationale: Because pdf2json can silently corrupt sensitive fields (name/email/phone/LinkedIn) by dropping characters like underscores, the app captures user-verified contact info once via a contact review card and stores it in appSession.confirmedContact as the highest-priority override during CV generation, instead of re-extracting from the PDF every time.

nodes.label: Interactive editable tailored CV (contenteditable)
nodes.rationale: Tailored CV HTML fields use contenteditable=true with .sl single-line class plus Enter-key prevention, and plain-text-only paste via clipboardData getData('text/plain') + execCommand('insertText'), so the candidate can manually polish wording with no further AI involvement and without breaking the CV layout.
